nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 塞舌尔寿带
nodes.summary: 塞舌尔寿带（Seychelles paradise flycatcher，学名 Terpsiphone corvina），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于塞舌尔、拉迪格岛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 拉迪格岛
nodes.summary: 拉迪格岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括塞舌尔寿带，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 塞舌尔
nodes.summary: 塞舌尔是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括Malagasy coucal、Malagasy turtle dove、斑姬地鸠等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is a forest-dwelling bird endemic to the Seychelles where it is native to the island of La Digue. Males have glossy black plumage with elongated tail feathers, while females are reddish-brown with pale underparts and no long tail feathers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is a forest-dwelling bird endemic to the Seychelles where it is native to the island of La Digue. Males have glossy black plumage with elongated tail feathers, while females are reddish-brown with pale underparts and no long tail feathers

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The threats it faces are a result of its specific habitat requirements which are incompatible with the habitat loss and fragmentation taking place on La Digue, due to increasing tourism and the expansion of settlements
